phrases.intent_en: Ask where the temporary exhibition is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está la exposición temporal?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿DOHN-deh eh-STAH lah eks-poh-see-SYOHN tem-poh-RAHL?

likely_response.translation_en: At the end of the hall, on the left.

responses.english: At the end of the hall, on the left.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the permanent collection is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde puedo ver la colección permanente?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh pweh-DOH behr lah koh-lehk-SYOHN pehr-mah-NEHN-teh?

likely_response.local: Suba al primer piso, Sala Azul y Roja.
likely_response.pronunciation: SOO-bah AHL pree-MEHR PEE-soh SAH-lah ah-THOOL Y ROH-hah
likely_response.translation_en: In the main rooms on the first floor.

responses.english: In the main rooms on the first floor.
responses.phonetic: SOO-bah AHL pree-MEHR PEE-soh SAH-lah ah-THOOL Y ROH-hah
responses.french: Suba al primer piso, Sala Azul y Roja.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the museum shop is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde se encuentra la tienda del museo?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh seh en-koo-EN-trah lah TYEHN-dah del moo-SEH-oh?

likely_response.local: Junto a la salida, en la planta baja.
likely_response.pronunciation: HOON-toh AH LAH sah-LEE-dah EHN LAH PLAHN-tah BAH-hah
likely_response.translation_en: Next to the exit, on the ground floor.

responses.english: Next to the exit, on the ground floor.
responses.phonetic: HOON-toh AH LAH sah-LEE-dah EHN LAH PLAHN-tah BAH-hah
responses.french: Junto a la salida, en la planta baja.

phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está la entrada accesible para sillas?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿DON-deh eh-STAH lah en-TRAH-dah ak-seh-SEE-bleh pah-rah SEE-yahs?

likely_response.local: Por la puerta lateral del patio, sin escalones.
likely_response.pronunciation: POHR LAH poo-EHR-tah lah-teh-RAHL DEHL pah-TEE-oh SEEN eh-skah-LOH-nehs
likely_response.translation_en: Next to the main entrance, no steps.

responses.english: Next to the main entrance, no steps.
responses.phonetic: POHR LAH poo-EHR-tah lah-teh-RAHL DEHL pah-TEE-oh SEEN eh-skah-LOH-nehs
responses.french: Por la puerta lateral del patio, sin escalones.
